title: JSON 名片 · Code as Object

shots.prompt:
Scene:
A clean editorial product still on a light grey minimalist studio surface with soft overhead window light, 3:2 horizontal framing.

Subject:
A premium physical business card rendered as a hyperreal 3D object — but the card's face is structured exactly like a JSON code object, with curly braces, keys and values floating on thin engraved metal plates. The card itself is a solid matte black slab with subtle beveled edges and a soft silver rim.

Important details:
The JSON is rendered as crisp clean white and warm orange inline syntax — standard code editor color theme (Monaco / JetBrains Mono feel), consistent quote marks, colons, and commas. Letters sit slightly recessed into the card like precision-engraved tooling. Subtle drop shadow on the card, shallow depth of field, editorial magazine craft aesthetic.

Screens and text:
Render the exact JSON content line by line on the card, perfectly aligned:

{
  "name": "Alex Chen",
  "role": "Product Designer",
  "stack": ["Figma", "Rust", "GPT-Image-2"],
  "city": "Shanghai",
  "since": 2024
}

All quotes, braces, brackets, commas must be crisp and legible in monospace code font. Correct syntax throughout.

Use case:
Concept editorial portrait of a modern designer's identity, personal-brand hero image, 3:2 horizontal.

Constraints:
No watermark, no extra logos, no decorative border. Aspect ratio 3:2.
shots.name: main
